reasoning: The control 'Access To Source Code' primarily pertains to managing and securing access to source code repositories and build environments, which are typically outside the direct scope of Kubernetes. Kubernetes does not natively manage source code or build processes; these are usually handled by CI/CD systems and source code management tools. The checks listed (e.g., artifact encryption, logging, environment variable checks) are specific to cloud-based build services and do not directly map to Kubernetes security controls.
title: Access To Source Code
